channel.title: WordPress on Sysadmin - Linux administration, security and hardening
channel.description: Recent content in WordPress on Sysadmin - Linux administration, security and hardening

item.title: WordPress configuration for connecting to a remote database
item.description: Hello, I will describe here step by step configuration of WordPress in configuration of two servers. These can be physical servers, or installed on virtual machines, either using VirtualBox or HyperV. Usually we encounter these configurations above, of course there are also other solutions, such as in the case of the hosting service provider, which has a database elsewhere, and in another location keeps a directory on the files of the website, but I will deal with the classic case, when we distinguish between two different servers.
item.dc:creator: sysadmin
